_README: Step-3 INPUT (copy to closet_input.json and fill). One entry per real worn outfit; list its garments. assemble_closet.py maps this -> the schema-valid closet_manifest.json (photo hashes, taxonomy, consent, audit) and validates it. Photos go under closet/ (gitignored). Use suggest(clothing_type, query) to find the polyvore_category_id. Set polyvore_category_id to null + add coarsening_note if no clean analog. Delete this _README + fill real data.
owner_id: FILL: an opaque, stable id (not your name/email)
